name: oscar-grounding-verifier-mcp
description: Mechanical citation-grounding verifier MCP for Oscar GC's Lavern partners. Adapter lift of Lavern's grounding-verifier.ts (Apache-2.0; commit 7c2efe61). Two tools: verify_grounding (single evidence/document pair) + verify_findings_batch. Takes document text + section headings as explicit parameters instead of reading from session.documents / session.debate.findings.
author: s-arturko
